description_long: This is a rectangular, upright carton of Milko strawberry-flavored milk, featuring a predominantly pink and white color scheme. The front displays playful graphics, including a smiling cartoon strawberry with arms and legs, and bold white 'milko' branding at the top. The sides of the carton provide nutritional information, product benefits, and additional cartoon strawberry characters, all set against a pink background with white accents. The top of the carton is fitted with a white plastic screw cap for pouring, and the packaging is decorated with various icons and text in Spanish. The overall design is vibrant and appealing, targeting a youthful audience with its fun illustrations and clear flavor indication. The carton appears to be made of laminated cardboard with a plastic cap, typical for liquid food packaging.
description: A pink and white Milko strawberry milk carton with playful strawberry graphics, bold branding, and a white screw cap. The packaging features nutritional info, product benefits, and fun illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'milko' logo, a large cartoon strawberry, and the flavor indication 'leche sabor frutilla' with a white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Back view displays detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and a smaller cartoon strawberry, with additional product claims and icons.
description_view_2: Side view highlights product benefits, two cartoon strawberries, and a customer service contact, all on a pink background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features instructions, flavor indication, and a list of other available flavors, with a white screw cap visible at the top.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'milko' brand logo is prominently displayed on the front and all sides of the carton in bold white lowercase letters against a pink background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front and sides display the text 'leche sabor frutilla' and feature cartoon strawberries, clearly indicating a strawberry flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutritional information panel is visible on the back, listing ingredients, nutritional values, and product claims.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Cartoon strawberry mascots are present on the front and sides, adding a playful and promotional visual element.
